title: Force Wind

{{Quote|You see? The contest may take any form! Can you stand your ground now? No - these winds will pull you through the viewport into the reactor shaft. You can do nothing!|Darth Vader to Luke Skywalker|<ref name="Radio">{{ESBRadio|The Clash of Lightsabers}}</ref>}}
'''Force Wind''' was a [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] [[Force power/Legends|Force power]]. The user was able to manipulate and channel air currents, allowing them to create destructive tornadoes.<ref name="JAS" />

During their [[Duel on Cloud City/Legends|duel on Cloud City]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], to gain an advantage over [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and demonstrate his superior command of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], summoned a wind that pulled his opponent into one of the [[Cloud City/Legends|city's]] [[Reactor/Legends|reactor]] shafts.<ref name="Radio" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ability to manipulate winds using the Force first appeared in [[Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (novelization)|''The Empire Strikes Back'' novelization]] and then in {{Film|V}} (1980) during Luke and Vader's duel on Cloud City. However, its appearance was ambiguous; it was not indicated whether the wind occurred naturally or had been summoned by Vader.<ref name="ESB">{{Film|V}}</ref> [[The Empire Strikes Back (radio)|''The Empire Strikes Back'' radio drama]] (1983) first specified that Vader had summoned the wind in the same way that he had unleashed a series of [[Telekinesis/Legends|telekinetic]] attacks during the same scene.<ref name="Radio" /> ''[[The Jedi Academy Sourcebook]]'' (1996) defined Force Wind as a Dark Side power for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="JAS" />
